sufficiency: Criteria cover required outputs, blocked-vs-synthetic execution state, blocker handling, measurement-to-rule traceability, owner acceptance boundaries, and public-safe constraints.
missing_critical_conditions: None identified beyond upstream read-only handling, missing-measurement blocking, and private/raw/secret/runtime path exclusion.
overfit_risks: Do not require exact baseline wording such as blocked_not_executed or synthetic_stub_only when equivalent statuses are clear.
suspicious_assumptions: Treat claimed real simulator execution, waveform evidence, owner approval, newly supplied model, or upstream correction as unsupported unless explicitly present in the fixture.
